scoutmarken.metaDescription: Scout badges tell your story. About adventures, knowledge and experiences. Learn what the badges mean and how they are worn on the scout shirt.
scoutmarken.title: Scout badges
scoutmarken.subTitle: Every scout badge tells a story

1.text: A badge is so much more than a piece of cloth. It shows that you have learned something, that you have been involved in something special, or that you belong to a certain patrol or scout troop.

2.text: Decorating your scout shirt with badges is a fun way to always remember your adventures and see everything you've learned along the way. A shirt story about everything you've been through!

scoutmarken.paragraph: A badge is so much more than a piece of cloth. It shows that you have learned something, that you have been involved in something special, or that you belong to a certain patrol or scout troop.

quali.title: Sjöscout badges
quali.info: Bevis - och behörighetsmärkena (certification and qualification badges) become a sign of what the scouts can do and contribute to safety.

ageBadges.title: Scout badges for specific age groups

1.text: For those of you who are spårare (trackers), there are four deltagandemärken (participation badges), bevismärket (proof badge) and many intressemärken (interest badges) to choose from.

2.text: For upptäckarscouter (explorer scouts) there are six deltagandemärken (participation badges), four bevismärken (proof badges) and many intressemärken (interest badges).

3.text: Äventyrarna (adventurers) have eight adventures that all have their own badge. Bevismärken (proof badges) and intressemärken (interest badges) as well!

4.text: As an utmanarscout (challenger scout) you create your own projects. You can celebrate the project you have completed with one of the badges.

interest.title: Intressemärken
interest.text: Here you will see some intressemärken (interest badges) that are about scouting on the lake and water.

placements.title: Every badge has its place
placements.text: Instructions for placing the new badges on the scout shirt.

1.text: You place the badge for your scout corps at the top of your left arm. You place the participation, qualification, proof and interest badges on the left sleeve.

2.text: You sew your patrol badge onto the right breast pocket together with the age group badge.

3.text: You put the Swedish, European and world organization badges at the top of the right sleeve. You also put your camp and event badges on the right arm.
